purpose: First real historical IWM Clean Fast Break replay v1 fixture. This fixture copies validated 1H RTH source OHLCV rows and covers signal/stage/lifecycle candidate shape only; it excludes trade outcomes, option economics, account sizing, broker execution, live trade decisions, and auto-trading.

source_data.setup_type_status: Clean Fast Break CANDIDATE / NEEDS REVIEW

boundary_notes: Each fixture row includes only validated IWM source candles available at or before that row timestamp.
OHLCV values are copied from the validated source CSV without edits or fabricated market data.

Exact final trigger, exact invalidation, completed-candle approval, final blocker, room, extension, macro, IV, event, and 24H context fields remain unconfirmed or TO REVIEW where repo evidence does not prove them.
Expected output rows are signal/stage/lifecycle candidate assertions only, not live trade instructions or execution recommendations.
Continuation is not an accepted relabel for this Clean Fast Break candidate fixture unless later repo-backed validation proves it.
This fixture does not include P&L, option contract economics, account sizing, trade outcome, broker/order/execution content, or auto-trading behavior.
